last_alert.reasoning: MSFT is up 1.7% from entry with no specific negative catalyst. The position is small and the thesis — broad AI/cloud exposure through a high-quality compounder — remains intact. No reason to trim or exit at this stage.

Tech-heavy index is up 1.3% today, likely riding the same macro tailwinds as MSFT. No specific catalyst to add here and the move looks routine rather than regime-changing. HOLD pending a more decisive setup.
